description_long: This is a large, cylindrical blue barrel with a slightly bulging midsection and two prominent horizontal reinforcement rings encircling its body. The barrel is constructed from a durable plastic material and features a tightly sealed, flat black lid on top. The surface of the barrel is worn and scratched, indicating frequent use, and there are visible smudges and a faint handprint on one side. A white triangular warning symbol with a radiation icon is clearly marked on the lower front, suggesting it is used for hazardous or radioactive materials. The overall form is robust and utilitarian, designed for secure storage and transport. Its size and markings make it suitable for industrial or urban utility environments.
description: A large blue plastic barrel with a black lid, reinforced rings, and a radiation warning symbol on its side. The surface is worn and marked, indicating industrial or hazardous use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the blue barrel with a black lid and visible reinforcement rings, no markings visible.
description_view_1: Side view similar to view 0, with more visible surface wear and scratches, but no clear markings.
description_view_2: Side view with a faint handprint and partial view of the radiation warning symbol, showing more surface detail.
description_view_3: Front view with the radiation warning symbol fully visible, along with reinforcement rings and the black lid.
